seo.title: MultiBranch Rentals — Car Rental Across the UAE
seo.description: Find the best car rental deals across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah. Multiple branches, one trusted name. Book online with instant WhatsApp confirmation.

hero.title: Where Do You Need a Car?
hero.subtitle: Choose your branch to see available cars, pricing, and local offers. We serve Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and more.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search for a city or branch...

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Choose from our wide selection of well-maintained vehicles
fleet.noCars: No cars available at this branch. Please select a different location.

locations.title: Our Branches
locations.subtitle: Visit us at any of our conveniently located branches across the UAE
locations.branchPageDesc: Rent a car in {city} from {brand}. View our fleet, pricing, and book online with instant WhatsApp confirmation.

branchDetail.noCars: No cars currently available at this branch. Please check our other branches.

corporate.title: Corporate & Fleet Accounts
corporate.subtitle: Tailored solutions for businesses requiring multiple vehicles
corporate.description: We offer customized fleet management solutions for businesses of all sizes. Whether you need daily rentals for your team or long-term fleet contracts, our corporate account team is here to help.
corporate.formSent: Thank you! Your inquiry has been received.
